title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zebronics South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Zebronics South Asia Partners:
Zebronics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics South Asia Partners!
